name: Spaghettini Alla Carrettiera
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground red chile, fresh tomatoes, garlic, and olive oil in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 30 minutes.
3. Use a food mill to remove seeds and skins from the tomato mixture.
4. Add heavy cream and vodka; return to a simmer and reduce for an additional 5-10 minutes.
5. Cook the spaghettini in 4 quarts of salted water until tender but still firm (al dente). Drain well.
6. Mix the sauce with the cooked spaghettini, top with parsley, and serve immediately.
